title: PvP Blood on the sword
description: The resource pack adds blood to the sword and preserves vanilla
body:
## Blood on the sword
### PvP sword
The resource pack is good for PVP and for vanilla, the beautifully crafted blood design on the sword

resource pack for 1.16.5+

1. Copy the resource pack to the folder .minecraft\resourcepacks
2. In the game settings, select the desired resource pack.
3. done

### Resource pack add

- This resource pack adds a change of swords such as netherite , diamond, iron, gold, stone and wooden.
  
-   Blood is added to netherite  and diamond for a beautiful pvp look and convenience.

- why is blood added only to diamond and netherite swords? In my opinion, they are the only ones who need them. If you add blood to each sword, it spoils the vanilla and will not become convenient
